message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.dropna (3 cases)

Append three live-pandas oracle tests to the existing
live_oracle_dataframe_series_core suite, pinning Series.dropna's
parity with pandas across the three coverage points that matter:

- live_oracle_series_dropna_basic
    Mixed-null series ([1.0, NaN, 3.0, NaN, 5.0]). Verifies dropna
    returns the 3 non-null values with the original index labels
    preserved (not re-sequenced 0..n-1).

- live_oracle_series_dropna_no_nulls
    Fully-populated series with no NaN. Pins that dropna is a
    no-op and returns a copy with identical values + index. (A
    surprising number of pandas helpers internally re-seat the
    index even when dropna is a no-op; this is the regression
    test for that.)

- live_oracle_series_dropna_all_nulls
    All-null series. Pins that dropna returns an empty Series
    with the same dtype and an empty index, not an Err and not
    a None — matching pandas' contract.

Sister to the recently-landed live_oracle_series_fillna_basic,
live_oracle_series_clip_negative_bounds, and
live_oracle_series_astype tests in this file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
